name: Upstage Solar Pro
archDisplay: Depth Up-Scaled (DUS) dense transformer built from Phi-3-medium (14B)
note: Sept 2024 MIT-licensed preview (4K ctx, English) topped the <70B Open LLM Leaderboard; a Nov 2024 official update added 32K context and multilingual support via API only.

results.notes: HF model card benchmark table, ARC-C column, 25-shot acc_norm per the card's own eval-protocol notes.
HF model card benchmark table, HellaSwag column, 10-shot acc_norm per the card's own eval-protocol notes.
HF model card benchmark table, 'BigBench Hard' column, 3-shot.

Same HF model-card evaluation table already used as the source for this entry's other 8 results (MMLU, MMLU-Pro, IFEval, GSM8K, MBPP, ARC-C, HellaSwag, BBH) also contains a GPQA row (0-shot, acc_norm, lm-eval-harness) reading 36.38 for solar-pro-preview — this row exists in the card's evaluation table but was not yet captured in the corpus entry. Verified by fetching the raw README.md directly (huggingface.co/upstage/solar-pro-preview-instruct/raw/main/README.md) and confirming the full table row-by-row. Two other columns in the same table (EQBench, MUSR) were also new but have no corresponding slug in the approved taxonomy, so they were not added.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Upstage announced Solar Pro Preview on 2024-09-11 (PRNewswire, Upstage's own blog corroborate). Fetched the Hugging Face model card and confirmed 22B params scaled from Phi-3-medium (14B) via DUS, MIT license, 4K context, and all five benchmark numbers (MMLU 79.14, MMLU-Pro 52.11, IFEval 84.37, GSM8K 89.69, MBPP 61.59) literally appear there.
